title: misch origins, Climber
description: Minecraft,, parkour,,,..? Just build up bro.
body:
heavily inspired/based on celeste

many textures/sound effects from celeste

if you can, and have the patience for, please play celeste,,,

![Celeste Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db7ab5f177d11be612217118d884e80a94c78151.png)

# about the pack
, choose to spawn as a Climber

, make your way into the summit ! travel alone or with a group of Climbers !

, dont forget to download the resourcepack

![Climber Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c377ae8105584711a090afb1bdeebda6cef302f6_0.webp)

![Climber GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c075fabd15dc383357fa37168c271f31e22eefe.png)

![Additional Info](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53dd77347171c5424df40bf8a33f68ff449f5d46_0.webp)

# notes
, strawberries will only spawn near and be picked up by Climbers

, strawberries can be given to non Climbers, aswell as eaten for their buffs !

, pouches can only be found in chests by Climbers

*>* Brown Pouches can be found in any chest

*>* Celestial Pouches can only be found in end city chests

, this origin can be used by multiple players

![Climber Drawing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ff8b9909461019bf76258a180420e98f4e2f16e.png)
